title: bidens tripartita
intro: Bidens tripartita, also known as three-lobe beggarticks, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds. The health benefits of Bidens tripartita include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Bidens tripartita can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, with the plant's leaves and flowers being the most commonly used parts for herbal preparations.
